name: I'm part at fault for my work accident, still get benefits?

mainEntity.name: I'm part at fault for my work accident, still get benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, no-fault ignores your partial fault.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers' comp ignores your fault—benefits for covered injuries regardless.[1][6] No-fault covers employee negligence.[1] Key factors: Must be work-related (AOE/COE); third-party suits may reduce by your % fault.[1] Practical guidance: Report honestly, don't fear denial for fault, focus on treatment. System designed for this protection.

description: Yes, no-fault ignores your partial fault.[1]
